name: Andrea
subject: restoring sanity and dignity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Hey there, team!

It might seem like we have some time until the October debate, but we're not the kind of campaign to sit back and let the cards fall where they may.

No, we are in this to win it -- and that means all hands on deck.

[**Can you contribute $3 right now to push our campaign closer towards making the debate?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-new-and-better?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190907_2_10&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+contribute+ask+right+now+to+push&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190907_2_10&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190907_2_10")

If this crazy, incredible, intense journey has taught me anything, it's that nothing is certain -- except for how much we rely on your grassroots support.

We owe you a debt of gratitude for everything you've done for this campaign. But the fight isn't over -- not until we restore sanity and dignity back to the White House. And for that, we need you!

**[https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/seize-the-moment](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-new-and-better?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190907_2_10&amount=3&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+httpssecuretimryanforamericacomseizethem&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190907_2_10&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190907_2_10")**

name: Joe Sestak
subject: "Mr. Trump is not the problem, he is a symptom of the problem" -- my speech to New Hampshire Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
Yesterday, I **spoke to New Hampshire Democrats at their state convention** alongside the other presidential candidates. My speech was extremely well-received because, although I am considered "late" in entering the race, _my message is extremely timely_ : **"Unaccountable leadership is responsible for the lack of trust in America's politicians today... Mr. Trump is not the problem, he is a symptom of the problem."**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9754683/96943098/641078767?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmFkYzc0OS00N2QyLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PGk968A8veYS5BviG05ORLgYUA3X5PbRmeZt-nLZTAw=&emci=00865b1d-3fd2-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=32adc749-47d2-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=250798&fbclid=IwAR2sJ_ZEujz5H-mza27FhhjSrLwAwUqJ4JTqTjeUd3giP49_Nl06qbDm1Qg)**
I told New Hampshire Democrats: **"I wore the cloth of our country for 31 years in war and in peace. It's where I learnt integrity's values: service to country, to others above self, with accountability in answering for oneself." **
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9754684/96943100/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmFkYzc0OS00N2QyLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PGk968A8veYS5BviG05ORLgYUA3X5PbRmeZt-nLZTAw=&refcode=em09082019nh)**
Healing our nation and uniting Americans again was key to the unique message I delivered to the New Hampshire Democratic Party Convention: **"We have no choice - we must have a President who can heal our nation’s soul, because people trust him, even when disagreeing well, because _they know he will be accountable to them_ , above party, above self, above any special interest."**
And I let them know my military service also served as a key to why I'm running — my unique understanding of the challenges a President and Commander-in-Chief must face: **"I also entered this race for another very different reason. I never forgot that those Democrats and Republicans alike who voted for that tragic war in Iraq didn't understand that militaries can stop a problem, but they can't fix a problem."**

body:
Hey, friends - Gary is hoping to go over the results from the survey he recently sent. We're looking for another 9 survey responses from Cresco, and it only takes a couple of minutes. Will you take his survey? Gary is really looking forward to hearing your thoughts. You can use this link: **[https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-priorities-survey](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-priorities-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk75-su-nd")**
-- Matt Phelan
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Gary Peters
Date: Tue, Sep 03, 2019
Subject: looking for your thoughts
[](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6dab2e/5721a3ed/72ad058a/efa0910/4149439296/VEsE/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
[](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6dab2e/5721a3ed/72ad058a/efa0910/4149439296/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
Friends,
Back in 2010, when I voted for the Affordable Care Act as a first-term congressman, Republicans threatened to end my political career. A decade later, they're still trying to take me down. It's a real ugly part of politics, but do you know why I keep fighting? Because more than 20 million Americans nationwide gained health insurance from the ACA, including 1.2 million Michiganders. It has literally saved lives.
Unfortunately, my opponent has called the Affordable Care Act a "monstrosity" and vowed to end it. He wants to take us back to the days when insurance companies called the shots and could make care unaffordable for those with preexisting conditions. With Mitch McConnell and President Trump also trying to dismantle the ACA, it's no wonder my opponent is their handpicked candidate. He said he backs the president "2,000%."
I don't back any extreme political agenda. I back Michigan, and I'm determined to keep working hard for Michigan families in the Senate. **That 's why I want to hear what's top of mind for folks.** **[Will you take a moment to take my survey and let me know which issues are most important to you and your family?](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-priorities-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk75-su-nd")**
The GOP knows that defeating me in Michigan means Democrats can't take back the Senate. They're counting on my opponent to win so they can finally dismantle our health care system that protects those with preexisting conditions once and for all.
I've won tough races before, and I've been successful thanks to supporters like you rallying beside me. That's why it's so important to get your feedback. Winning takes all of us speaking out and standing up for what matters. **[So, will you click here and let me know what's on your mind?](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-priorities-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk75-su-nd")**
Thank you for sharing your thoughts. I'm so glad to have you on this team.
Gary

[To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6dab2e/5721a3ed/72ad058a/efa08ef/4149439296/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN
Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244

You can use this link: "" -- Matt Phelan \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Gary Peters Date: Tue, Sep 03, 2019 Subject: looking for your thoughts "" "" Friends, Back in 2010, when I voted for the Affordable Care Act as a first-term congressman, Republicans threatened to end my political career. A decade later, they're still trying to take me down. It's a real ugly part of politics, but do you know why I keep fighting? Because more than 20 million Americans nationwide gained health insurance from the ACA, including 1.2 million Michiganders. It has literally saved lives. Unfortunately, my opponent has called the Affordable Care Act a "monstrosity" and vowed to end it. He wants to take us back to the days when insurance companies called the shots and could make care unaffordable for those with preexisting conditions. With Mitch McConnell and President Trump also trying to dismantle the ACA, it's no wonder my opponent is their handpicked candidate. He said he backs the president "2,000%." I don't back any extreme political agenda. I back Michigan, and I'm determined to keep working hard for Michigan families in the Senate. That 's why I want to hear what's top of mind for folks. "" The GOP knows that defeating me in Michigan means Democrats can't take back the Senate. They're counting on my opponent to win so they can finally dismantle our health care system that protects those with preexisting conditions once and for all. I've won tough races before, and I've been successful thanks to supporters like you rallying beside me. That's why it's so important to get your feedback. Winning takes all of us speaking out and standing up for what matters. "" Thank you for sharing your thoughts. I'm so glad to have you on this team. | Team - Since the Supreme Court decision in _Citizens United_ , dark money has absolutely flooded our elections.

This year, the DNC is taking it upon themselves to enact fundraising criteria to narrow the field of candidates instead of letting the voters decide.

This is an embarrassment for the party that wants to end _Citizens United_.

If we wanted to be the party that set up rules that excluded people and gamed the system in favor of billionaires, we'd be Republicans.

[We need to know where you stand. name: Rob Flaherty, Beto for America
subject: Good news and bad news…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
We’ve just been chatting with the legal team about all the hoops you have to jump through to get on the ballot in all 50 states + all the territories. YIKES -- there are so many crazy rules!
#
So, good or bad news first? Ok, here goes:
* **Good news:** Beto has more field offices and staff than most candidates. We’re in a REALLY good position heading into the first contests next year.

* **Bad news:** We’ve just been chatting with the legal team about all the hoops you have to jump through to get on the ballot in all 50 states + all the territories. YIKES -- there are so many crazy rules! Lawyers mirite? If we don’t do everything exactly right, Beto might not be able to get his name on the ballot in each state.

**This is where you come in!** We’re launching a “Get Beto on the Ballot” fund. The money goes toward collecting signatures to qualify, paying fees in each state, and paying for the legal expertise we need to navigate the rules.
**It’s going to cost us about $265,000, which sounds scary.** BUT if everyone reading this email gives like one dollar, we could raise that in just a few hours.
[Can you chip in towards the fund right now? Either give just a dollar, or give a bit more to make up for the people who can’t.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32780?refcode=ema20190908-53937&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=53937%2E444211%2EFr56kv)
**[Help Beto make the ballot](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32780?refcode=ema20190908-53937&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=53937%2E444211%2EFr56kv)**
If you think I’m kidding about how hard it is to make the ballot in every state, you don’t have to look very far back to find examples of all sorts of leading candidates who failed to qualify in a certain state. The rules are so complex, and there’s a different set of requirements in just about every state and territory. It’s a mess.
Ok — so $265,000. Can we get there today? Or this week maybe? Let’s find out.
[Add your donation right now to the “Get Beto on the Ballot” fund.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/32780?refcode=ema20190908-53937&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=53937%2E444211%2EFr56kv)
Thanks as always for all your help.
Rob Flaherty
Digital Director
Beto for America

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=53937%2E444211%2EFr56kv). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Cory Booker
subject: Tom Steyer makes eleven
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, this morning it was announced that Tom Steyer has officially qualified for the October debate stage. He announced his candidacy just a few months ago and since then, he's spent over $10 million of his own money to fund his campaign. The truth is, I don't have billions of dollars in personal wealth. I rely on grassroots donations of $3, $5, and $20 from people like you to power this campaign. **And just yesterday, we needed to raise $28,417 to stay on pace for fundraising this month and we came up short.** [**We 've already fallen short once this month and cannot afford to do it again. Can you help us close the gap from yesterday by chipping in right now?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190908_CB_20190908-fr-CB-TS-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Tom leapfrogged over a dozen candidates and it's now looking like the October debate will be held on two nights. I'll be honest that's going to be hard to compete with. When we miss goals or fall short of what we need to raise daily, it slows us down and frankly, that isn't an option when you have a billionaire in the race. It's why I'm asking for your help to make sure we have all the resources we need to hire field organizers, open campaign offices, and even run local ads to spread our campaign message. [**We 're falling behind for this month and need to make up $6,391 on top of today's fundraising. Donate right now to get us back on track >>**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190908_CB_20190908-fr-CB-TS-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thank you,
Cory

name: Team Weld
subject: another meeting, another deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCNVwYMncZeInum3B_qO3Ctk&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190908_fr&n=1) Friend — we just got out of our weekly Sunday meeting and our finance team has just given us**a huge goal for the end of the month.** The end of September marks the end of the 3rd fiscal quarter – this means our campaign is going to have to report all of our fundraising numbers to the FEC. **How much we’ve raised, and how much we’ve spent will all be available on the internet for friends and enemies alike to parse through.** What beltway pundits and Washington consultants will tell you is this —**the strength of a campaign is determined by how much money they can raise.** Now we know that’s not true, but if we want to make a splash at the end of the month and really get in Donald Trump’s head _**we need to hit the $100,000 online fundraising goal our finance team just gave us for this month.**_ [**Can you help us reach our end-of-quarter online fundraising goal by rushing a donation of $25, $50, or whatever you can today?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCNVwYMncZeInum3B_qO3Ctk&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190908_fr&n=2) — Team Weld | | [SUPPORT THE MOVEMENT ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCNVwYMncZeInum3B_qO3Ctk&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190908_fr&n=3)
